title: HMPPS Welsh Language Scheme 2024 to 2027
body: "In line with the Welsh Language Act 1993 and subsequent Welsh Language (Wales) Measure 2011, His Majesty’s Prison and Probation Service (HMPPS) continues to adopt the principle that in the conduct of public business and the administration of justice in Wales, it will treat the English and Welsh languages on a basis of equality.  "
